title: Link to board URL
excerpt:
I use the Monday.com desktop app, and one thing that drives me crazy is the inability to copy and share a simple link to any board. 
I often want to include a board link in a comment, slack message, email, or link column…

posts.author: Wesley (Wesley Gant)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use the Monday.com desktop app, and one thing that drives me crazy is the inability to copy and share a simple link to any board.

I often want to include a board link in a comment, slack message, email, or link column on another board. Technically, you can find the board URL through item URLs, but it’s super cumbersome. It should be easy to “copy board link” straight from the “…” dropdown.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Wesley - I too have struggled with this when you want the URL you actually have to navigate to the board to get it. What we do for most projects is actually create a board of URLs for every object we create (board, dashboard, doc, etc) which works as an easy reference point to get this information. You can then utilize these in connected columns if need be.

It’s certainly not a solution but it’s something I thought I would share.

Thanks!
Mark

posts.author: weareborg (Kenneth Killeen)
posts.cookedHtml: I really think there should be a dedicated column option called Board Link or something similar. Similar format as the Link column but its just provides a ‘local’ board search. It would speed up internal internal navigation a lot. I’m on the desktop app on Mac and I see no way to find the URL of a board on it?

posts.author: jkohlin (Johan)
posts.cookedHtml: This is very frustrating. I have to viti Monday.com to find the link to a board. Just put a link in the three-dot-menu, please.

posts.author: Johnny (Johnny Morse)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was about to make my own feature feedback post on this, but instead found 3 or 4 different posts on the same topic. This one had the most votes, so I went ahead and added one more.

It’s the little things, and this would be a great addition to the desktop app!

posts.author: Vtab (Vero Tabares)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be super helpful when automating email notifications and allowing the users to click a link back to the board or item directly. It’s a no brainer!

posts.author: guitadei.agante (Guilherme Tadei)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

If I understand correctly the question, I also had doubts about this.

However, I found that you can share the board view’s… by clicking on the “three dots” in the view name:

Regards.

posts.author: jparty (Javier Party)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! This should be easy to implement. Internal linking capabilities. We need it too.

posts.author: jparty (Javier Party)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you give us the links to the other posts? Thanks!

posts.author: leland (Leland Baxter-Neal)
posts.cookedHtml: work around - for folks who use Raycast, or need a reason to, the Monday.com extension allows you to quickly browse recent boards and pull their URL. But it would be really great if this could be done directly from the native monday app.

posts.author: leland (Leland Baxter-Neal)
posts.cookedHtml: this creates a publicy shareable link and then a banner at the top of the page which states that its publcly shareable - not really the ideal outcome if you don’t actually want to publicly share the board.

posts.author: bmatevski (Bojan Matevski)
posts.cookedHtml: What happened with this feature? Is there a way to easily link a board to another board?

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml: It is 2024 and still there is no way to simply share a link to a colleague from the desktop app. Monday, please!?

posts.author: adib (adib jorge oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Seriously, how did no one pick up on this ?
This feature alone is making me consider ditching monday entirely.

posts.author: ECO_Blair (Blair Cole)
posts.cookedHtml: I used to be able to Right Click → Copy Link on the ‘Recent Boards’ page of a workspace. This has since stopped working. Any idea why?
